purpose: enforce reversible-faint KO semantics and a one-way revive rise without altering authored pixels
rule: down may use open spiral, unfocused, or effortful closed eyes but never X/cross/death marks; revive must not stand and then fall back; down-8 and revive-1 are exact
method: deterministic byte-exact copies of existing installed candidate frames; no generation, drawing, interpolation, resampling, despill, alpha edit, or colour edit

excludedDeathCue.reason: source frame 7 contains literal X/cross eyes; the authored open-spiral prone hold in frame 8 is the reversible-faint terminal pose
